name: Caramel Nut Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, cinnamon, cloves, baking soda) into the mixture and stir in the cold coffee.
4. Mix in the chopped dates, walnuts, and peeled, chopped apples until combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13x9 inch pan or bundt pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes (rectangle pan) or 45 to 60 minutes (bundt pan).
7. Cool completely before frosting with caramel glaze, if desired, or dusting with powdered sugar.
